description_long: This is a blue four-door pickup truck with a robust and modern design, featuring a spacious open cargo bed at the rear and a double-cab passenger compartment. The vehicle has a prominent front grille with a Chevrolet badge, black side mirrors, and silver running boards beneath the doors. The wheels are large with silver rims, and the truck is equipped with a black bull bar on the front bumper for added protection. The rear of the truck includes red tail lights and a tailgate, while the roof has subtle ridges for structural strength. The windows are tinted dark, and the overall build suggests a combination of metal, glass, and plastic materials typical of urban utility vehicles.
description: A blue four-door Chevrolet pickup truck with a cargo bed, silver running boards, and a black bull bar, designed for urban utility.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, and red tail lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, silver running board, and large wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the Chevrolet grille, black bull bar, and tinted windshield.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing doors, running board, and cargo bed.
